title: feat: add retry policy to session manager
body:
## Overview

Add configurable retry policy for transient session failures.

## Expected Behavior

Session failures with transient errors (network, timeout) retry up to N times with exponential backoff.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Retry count is configurable via maestro.toml
- [ ] Exponential backoff between attempts
- [ ] Permanent errors do not retry
- [ ] Metrics track retry count per session

## Files to Modify

- src/session/manager.rs
- src/config.rs

## Test Hints

Mock the Claude CLI subprocess via a trait-based fake. Assert retry count matches config.

## Blocked By

- None

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Feature flag added
